_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of code injection and its employment in cyberspace operations.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbreaking, data exfiltration via LLM outputs, and model supply chain vulnerabilities.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-011 (SP, cosine: 0.412), RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.411).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.406). Shared vocabulary: [injection, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [code, cyberspace, employment, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, chain, data, exfiltration, jailbreaking] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.887, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:50.7%, C:49.3%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of code injection and its employment in cyberspace operations." vs "Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbrea" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.455 ≈ STS 0.406 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [injection, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [injection, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [code, cyberspace, employment, operations]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, chain, data, exfiltration, jailbreaking].
